Gas shortages and policy failures

Forgotten lessons in our schools

IN Bangladesh, education is often treated as the primary route to stability, dignity and social mobility. Parents invest enormous financial and emotional energy into their children’s schooling, students spend years preparing for examinations and academic achievement continues to shape how success is measured in society.
